description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:10.14.2-stretch Docker image with three stages: setup, verify, and deploy. In the setup stage add an install job that caches .cache/npm and runs npm install --quiet --no-progress --cache=.cache/npm. In the verify stage add a lint job that reuses the same npm cache and runs npm install --quiet --no-progress --cache=.cache/npm then node_modules/.bin/gulp lint. In the deploy stage add three jobs: bundle-dev, which pulls the npm cache (policy pull), runs npm install --quiet --no-progress --cache=.cache/npm and node_modules/.bin/gulp bundle, stores build/ui-bundle.zip as an artifact expiring in 1 day, and runs on all branches except master; bundle-stable, which also uses the npm cache, runs the same install and bundle commands, stores build/ui-bundle.zip as an artifact, and runs only on the master branch of the antora/antora-ui-default project; and pages, which uses the npm cache, runs npm install --quiet --no-progress --cache=.cache/npm, node_modules/.bin/gulp preview:build, and rm -rf public/_/{helpers,layouts,partials}, publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch of the antora/antora-ui-default project.
